# PrimeGlobalFX — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> AlphaMexxTrade is a professional forex and multi-asset online trading broker designed to attract and convert global retail traders, with particular appeal to African markets. The brand projects authority, trust, and financial success through a sleek dark-themed aesthetic with blue and green accents, trust badges, awards walls, and aspirational imagery of charts and successful traders. The site is built around urgency-driven, high-pressure marketing with aggressive CTAs, tiered account structures offering escalating VIP benefits, and an interactive onboarding quiz that funnels users toward a recommended account. The overall vibe is bold, credible, and conversion-obsessed — evoking the feel of a globally recognized, regulated broker.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app
Unleash your trading potential on the award-winning MT4 forex trading platform. Join PrimeGlobalFX for tight spreads, VIP perks, and instant market access. Start your success story today.

### Accounts
https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/accounts
Compare tiered trading accounts built for winners. From Silver to Platinum VIP, each tier escalates your benefits, leverage, and profit potential. Find your perfect match now.

### Markets & Platform
https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/markets-platform
Access forex, indices, and commodities with live kitco gold and silver prices on the powerful MT4 forex trading platform. Execute trades with lightning speed and precision.

### Education & Support
https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/education-support
Turn knowledge into profit with expert-led webinars, tutorials, and 24/5 support. PrimeGlobalFX equips you with the tools to trade confidently and win consistently.

### Contact
https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to trade like a pro? Contact PrimeGlobalFX for priority onboarding, dedicated account support, and exclusive market insights. Your breakthrough starts with one click.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://primeglobalfx-266392ac.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About PrimeGlobalFX
AlphaMexxTrade is a professional forex and multi-asset online trading broker designed to attract and convert global retail traders, with particular appeal to African markets. The brand projects authority, trust, and financial success through a sleek dark-themed aesthetic with blue and green accents, trust badges, awards walls, and aspirational imagery of charts and successful traders. The site is built around urgency-driven, high-pressure marketing with aggressive CTAs, tiered account structures offering escalating VIP benefits, and an interactive onboarding quiz that funnels users toward a recommended account. The overall vibe is bold, credible, and conversion-obsessed — evoking the feel of a globally recognized, regulated broker.

## Target Audience
- Young Aspiring Traders
- Part-time Forex Enthusiasts
- Digital Nomad Traders
- Experienced Forex Investors

## Industry
Financial Services / Forex Brokerage
